title: Submit a Venue
subtitle: Register a venue so it can be used to host Pana MIA events. Submissions are reviewed by our admin team before going live.
signInRequired: You must be signed in to submit a venue.
panaRequired: Only verified Panas can submit venues. Complete your profile first.
hint: Tell us what you know. If you don't know a field, leave it blank — we can fill in the details later.

location.heading: Location & Parcel
location.parcelHint: Florida property folio / PCN. Used to prevent duplicate venue registrations.
location.pcnConflict: A venue with this parcel already exists: {{name}} ({{status}}).

type.heading: Venue Type
type.type: What kind of venue is this?
type.usage: Is this space primarily for events, or a mixed-use space?

capacity.heading: Capacity
capacity.fireCapacityHint: This is a hard cap — RSVPs for events at this venue cannot exceed this number.
capacity.capacityHint: How many people comfortably fit, not counting the legal maximum.

av.heading: AV & Furnishings
av.subheading: What does the venue provide on its own? Check all that apply.

accessibility.heading: Accessibility & Parking
accessibility.accessibilityNotesPlaceholder: Elevator, restroom accessibility, service animals allowed, etc.
accessibility.parkingInstructionsPlaceholder: Special directions, meter hours, validation, etc.

safety.heading: Safety
safety.subheading: All fields optional — tell us what you know.
safety.severeWeatherShelter: Can serve as severe-weather / hurricane shelter

insurance.heading: Insurance
insurance.subheading: A Certificate of Insurance (COI) is strongly recommended. Events at this venue may require one.
insurance.notes: Carrier, coverage amounts, additional insured requirements

rental.heading: Rental & Booking
rental.isFree: This venue is free to use
rental.pricingNotesPlaceholder: Sliding scale, day/night rates, deposit required, etc.
rental.bookingInstructionsPlaceholder: Email, form URL, lead time, etc.

licensing.heading: Licensing & Rules
licensing.hasLiquorLicense: Venue has an active liquor license
licensing.houseRulesPlaceholder: Quiet hours, prohibited activities, dress code, load-in rules, etc.
licensing.supportingDocsHint: URLs to photos, floor plans, or other documents. Add one per line.

review.heading: Review & Submit
review.summaryIntro: Here's what you're about to submit. You can go back to edit anything.
review.tos: I confirm the information above is accurate to the best of my knowledge.
review.pendingNotice: Your venue will be reviewed by Pana MIA admins before it appears in events.

confirmation.heading: Submitted!
confirmation.body: Your venue is in the review queue. We'll email you when it's approved.

errors.parcelDuplicate: A venue with this parcel control number already exists.
